mapper.select: SELECT ID, ALLOCATE_ID, SORT_NUM, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION, SPEC_DESC, BRAND, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, ALLOC_QTY, AVAILABLE_QTY, TAX_IN_PRICE, TAX_IN_AMT, FLOW_DIRECTION, REMARK, OUT_DETAIL_ID, IN_DETAIL_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM E_M_MAT_ALLOC_DTL WHERE ALLOCATE_ID = #{allocateId} ORDER BY NVL(SORT_NUM, 999999) ASC, ID ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_M_MAT_ALLOC_DTL ( ID, ALLOCATE_ID, SORT_NUM, MATERIAL_ID, MATERIAL_CODE, MATERIAL_NAME, SPECIFICATION, SPEC_DESC, BRAND, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, ALLOC_QTY, AVAILABLE_QTY, TAX_IN_PRICE, TAX_IN_AMT, FLOW_DIRECTION, REMARK, OUT_DETAIL_ID, IN_DETAIL_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )
SELECT #{item.id}, #{item.allocateId}, #{item.sortNum}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.specification}, #{item.specDesc}, #{item.brand}, #{item.unitCode}, #{item.unitName}, #{item.allocQty}, #{item.availableQty}, #{item.taxInPrice}, #{item.taxInAmt}, #{item.flowDirection}, #{item.remark}, #{item.outDetailId}, #{item.inDetailId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createByName}, #{item.createTime} FROM DUAL
